Label: Dataset
Description: A set of RDF triples that are published, maintained, or aggregated as a single dataset.

Label: protein
Description: A protein is an organic polymer composed of one or more linear polymers of amino acids.

Label: Statement
Description: The class of RDF statements, used for reification of subject-predicate-object triples.

Label: evidence count
Description: NCIPIDKG edge metadata giving the number of supporting INDRA/NCI-PID evidence records for a reified relationship.

Label: evidence URL
Description: NCIPIDKG edge metadata linking a reified relationship to supporting evidence records or evidence pages.

Label: process type
Description: NCIPIDKG edge metadata indicating the biological process or post-translational-modification type associated with a relationship, often represented with a GO term.

Label: datatype
Description: VoID extension property used in dataset statistics to identify a datatype represented in a datatype partition.

Label: datatype partition
Description: VoID extension property used to link a dataset or property partition to a partition grouped by RDF literal datatype.

Label: object class partition
Description: VoID extension property used to link a property partition to a partition grouped by the RDF class of object resources.

Label: regulates
Description: x regulates y if x has an effect on the frequency, rate, or extent of y.

Label: molecularly interacts with
Description: A relation between molecular entities that directly physically interact with each other, for example through stable binding or transient interaction.

Label: directly regulates
Description: p directly regulates q if p immediately causally affects q and regulates q, commonly through direct physical interaction between participating molecular agents.

Label: directly positively regulates
Description: p directly positively regulates q if p is immediately causally upstream of q and positively regulates q.

Label: directly negatively regulates
Description: p directly negatively regulates q if p is immediately causally upstream of q and negatively regulates q.

Label: modified
Description: Date on which the resource was changed.

Label: last updated on
Description: The date of the last update of the resource.

Label: version
Description: A version number or other version designation for the resource.

Label: class
Description: The RDF class used to define a class-based partition of a dataset.

Label: class partition
Description: A subset of a dataset containing the triples associated with instances of a particular RDF class.

Label: distinct objects
Description: The total number of distinct objects in a dataset, linkset, or partition.

Label: distinct subjects
Description: The total number of distinct subjects in a dataset, linkset, or partition.

Label: entities
Description: The total number of entities described in a dataset.

Label: properties
Description: The total number of distinct properties used in a dataset.

Label: property
Description: The RDF property used to define a property-based partition of a dataset.

Label: property partition
Description: A subset of a dataset containing triples that use a particular RDF property.

Label: triples
Description: The total number of triples contained in a dataset, linkset, or partition.

Label: object
Description: The object of an RDF statement.

Label: predicate
Description: The predicate of an RDF statement.

Label: subject
Description: The subject of an RDF statement.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable name for the subject resource.

Label: same as
Description: Links an individual to another individual with the same identity.
